# AlgoFlow -- Screen Map

<!-- Generated by Maestro Planner Phase P3 (Screen Mapper) -->
<!-- Source: 00-master-plan.md, 01-prd.md, 02-architecture.md, 03-data-model.md, CLAUDE.md -->
<!-- Authoritative reference for all frontend implementing agents -->

---

## 1. Navigation Structure (Route Tree)

```
/ (Landing)
|   Auth: None
|   Purpose: First impression, "How It Works", role selection
|   Entry: Direct navigation or redirect when no wallet connected
|
+-- /employer (Employer Dashboard)
|     Auth: Wallet connected + activeAddress === contract.employer
|     Purpose: Fund, register, manage employees, emergency controls
|     Guard: If wallet not connected -> show WalletConnect prompt
|            If activeAddress !== employer -> redirect to /employee
|
+-- /employee (Employee Dashboard)
      Auth: Wallet connected
      Purpose: View accrual, withdraw, transaction history
      Guard: If wallet not connected -> show WalletConnect prompt
             If activeAddress === employer -> redirect to /employer
```

### Role Detection Flow

```
User visits any route
  |
  v
Wallet connected?
  |-- No --> Show WalletConnect prompt (or landing page manual role selector)
  |
  +-- Yes --> Query contract global state for "employer" key
                |
                +-- activeAddress === employer --> /employer
                +-- activeAddress !== employer --> /employee
                +-- No contract deployed / APP_ID unset --> Stay on landing, show manual toggle
```

---

## 2. Page Inventory

### 2.1 Landing Page (`/`)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| **Purpose** | First impression for all visitors. Explains the streaming model, provides role selection entry points, establishes the visual identity (dark theme, Silk 3D background, glassmorphism). |
| **Auth Required** | None |
| **Data Requirements** | VITE_NETWORK (for NetworkBadge), VITE_APP_ID (to check if contract is deployed for auto-routing) |
| **Data Source** | Environment variables only. No on-chain data needed. |
| **FRs Covered** | FR-SHARED-001 (role routing), FR-SHARED-002 (landing page with diagram), FR-SHARED-006 (network badge), FR-SHARED-007 (dark theme, glassmorphism) |
| **Key Components** | Silk, HowItWorks, RoleSelector, WalletConnect, NetworkBadge, ShinyText, SpotlightCard |

### 2.2 Employer Dashboard (`/employer`)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| **Purpose** | Complete employer control panel: fund contract, register employees, monitor streams, manage rates, pause/resume, milestone payments, emergency controls, contract health monitoring. |
| **Auth Required** | Wallet connected AND activeAddress matches contract `employer` global state |
| **Data Requirements** | Contract global state (employer, salary_asset, total_employees, total_streamed, is_paused), contract PAYUSD balance, contract ALGO balance, per-employee local state (salary_rate, stream_start, last_withdrawal, total_withdrawn, is_active) for all registered employees, employer wallet PAYUSD balance (for funding) |
| **Data Source** | Algod (global state polling every 5s), Algod (local state for each employee, polling every 5s), Algod (account info for balance), environment variables (APP_ID, ASSET_ID, NETWORK) |
| **FRs Covered** | FR-EMPLOYER-001 through FR-EMPLOYER-009, FR-CONTRACT-002 through FR-CONTRACT-012, FR-SHARED-001, FR-SHARED-003 through FR-SHARED-007, FR-TOKEN-001 through FR-TOKEN-002 |
| **Key Components** | WalletConnect, SetupChecklist, ContractHealth, FundForm, RegisterForm, EmployeeList, EmployeeRow, MilestonePayForm, EmergencyControls, NetworkBadge, Toast, ExplorerLink, SpotlightCard |

### 2.3 Employee Dashboard (`/employee`)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| **Purpose** | Employee view: real-time streaming counter (the "wow" moment), one-click withdrawal, transaction history, rate/status display with change detection. |
| **Auth Required** | Wallet connected (any address; dashboard adapts based on registration status) |
| **Data Requirements** | Employee local state (salary_rate, stream_start, last_withdrawal, total_withdrawn, is_active), contract global state (is_paused, salary_asset), on-chain get_accrued result (for counter sync), transaction history from Indexer (past withdrawals filtered by algoflow: note prefix), localStorage last-visit timestamp (for "New" badge) |
| **Data Source** | Algod (local state polling every 5s), Algod (get_accrued read-only call on load + every 30s for resync), Indexer (transaction history on load), localStorage (last-visit timestamp), environment variables (APP_ID, ASSET_ID, NETWORK) |
| **FRs Covered** | FR-EMPLOYEE-001 through FR-EMPLOYEE-005, FR-CONTRACT-005, FR-CONTRACT-006, FR-SHARED-001, FR-SHARED-003 through FR-SHARED-007, FR-TOKEN-003, FR-TOKEN-004 |
| **Key Components** | WalletConnect, StreamCounter, WithdrawButton, RateDisplay, StatusBadge, TransactionHistory, NetworkBadge, Toast, ExplorerLink, SpotlightCard |

---

## 3. Component Hierarchy Per Page

### 3.1 Landing Page (`/`)

```
main.tsx
  WalletProvider (@txnlab/use-wallet-react)
    App.tsx (React Router)
      Landing.tsx
        +-- Silk.tsx
        |     Full-viewport Three.js canvas, renders behind all content.
        |     Fixed position, z-index: 0. Fragment shader with procedural
        |     noise + time uniform. Dark green/black palette matching --bg-dark.
        |
        +-- <header> (fixed top bar)
        |     +-- Logo / "AlgoFlow" text (ShinyText.tsx with shimmer)
        |     +-- NetworkBadge.tsx (top-right corner, "Testnet" or "LocalNet")
        |     +-- WalletConnect.tsx (connect button, top-right)
        |
        +-- <main> (centered content, z-index: 1, above Silk)
        |     +-- Hero section
        |     |     +-- ShinyText.tsx ("Real-Time Payroll Streaming on Algorand")
        |     |     +-- Subtitle paragraph (Geist Variable, --text-light)
        |     |
        |     +-- HowItWorks.tsx
        |     |     +-- SpotlightCard.tsx (Step 1: "Employer Funds Contract")
        |     |     |     Icon + description text
        |     |     +-- Arrow/connector graphic
        |     |     +-- SpotlightCard.tsx (Step 2: "Salary Streams Every Second")
        |     |     |     Icon + description text
        |     |     +-- Arrow/connector graphic
        |     |     +-- SpotlightCard.tsx (Step 3: "Withdraw Anytime")
        |     |           Icon + description text
        |     |
        |     +-- RoleSelector.tsx
        |           +-- SpotlightCard.tsx ("I'm an Employer")
        |           |     Icon, description, CTA button
        |           |     onClick: connect wallet then navigate to /employer
        |           +-- SpotlightCard.tsx ("I'm an Employee")
        |                 Icon, description, CTA button
        |                 onClick: connect wallet then navigate to /employee
        |
        +-- <footer> (optional)
              +-- "Built on Algorand" text
              +-- Hackathon attribution
```

### 3.2 Employer Dashboard (`/employer`)

```
EmployerDashboard.tsx
  +-- Silk.tsx (same 3D background, shared across all pages)
  |
  +-- <header> (fixed top bar)
  |     +-- Logo / "AlgoFlow" (link to /)
  |     +-- NetworkBadge.tsx
  |     +-- WalletConnect.tsx (shows connected address, disconnect option)
  |
  +-- WalletConnect.tsx (full-page overlay if wallet not connected)
  |     Shown ONLY when wallet is disconnected. Prompt + QR code / KMD selector.
  |
  +-- SetupChecklist.tsx (conditional: shown when contract is newly deployed)
  |     Shown when: contract deployed but setup incomplete
  |     +-- Step 1: "Contract Deployed" (check mark if APP_ID exists)
  |     +-- Step 2: "ASA Opt-In" (check if contract holds PAYUSD, action button)
  |     +-- Step 3: "Fund Contract" (check if PAYUSD balance > 0, action button)
  |     +-- Step 4: "Register First Employee" (check if total_employees > 0, action button)
  |     Progress bar showing 0/4 to 4/4 completion
  |     Hidden once all 4 steps are complete.
  |
  +-- <main> (two-column or stacked layout)
  |     +-- Left/Top column: Management
  |     |     +-- ContractHealth.tsx (SpotlightCard wrapper)
  |     |     |     +-- PAYUSD balance display ("$100,000.00 PAYUSD")
  |     |     |     +-- ALGO balance display
  |     |     |     +-- Runway indicator bar (green/amber/red)
  |     |     |     |     "Runway: ~303 hours (~12.6 days) at $330/hr"
  |     |     |     +-- Low-fund warning banner (shown when runway < 24 hours)
  |     |     |     |     "--accent red background: "Low Funds: Less than 24h runway remaining"
  |     |     |     +-- Total streamed lifetime counter
  |     |     |     +-- Total employees count
  |     |     |     +-- Global pause status indicator
  |     |     |
  |     |     +-- FundForm.tsx (SpotlightCard wrapper)
  |     |     |     +-- Amount input (number, PAYUSD)
  |     |     |     +-- "Fund Contract" button
  |     |     |     +-- Shows employer's available PAYUSD balance
  |     |     |
  |     |     +-- RegisterForm.tsx (SpotlightCard wrapper)
  |     |           +-- Mode toggle: "Single" / "Batch"
  |     |           +-- Single mode:
  |     |           |     +-- Address input (58-char Algorand address)
  |     |           |     +-- Rate input ($/hr)
  |     |           |     +-- "Register Employee" button
  |     |           +-- Batch mode:
  |     |                 +-- Row 1: Address input + Rate input
  |     |                 +-- Row 2: Address input + Rate input
  |     |                 +-- Row 3: Address input + Rate input (max 3)
  |     |                 +-- "Batch Register" button (atomic group)
  |     |
  |     +-- Right/Bottom column: Employee Management
  |           +-- EmployeeList.tsx (SpotlightCard wrapper)
  |           |     +-- Column headers: Employee, Rate, Status, Accrued, Actions
  |           |     +-- EmployeeRow.tsx (repeated for each registered employee, max 3 for demo)
  |           |     |     +-- Truncated address (ExplorerLink.tsx, "ABC123...XY78")
  |           |     |     +-- Hourly rate display ("$100.00/hr")
  |           |     |     +-- StatusBadge.tsx ("Active" green / "Paused" amber / "PAUSED (Global)" red)
  |           |     |     +-- Live accrued amount ("$12,000.00", updates every 5s)
  |           |     |     +-- Action buttons row:
  |           |     |           +-- "Pause" button (shown when is_active=1)
  |           |     |           +-- "Resume" button (shown when is_active=0)
  |           |     |           +-- "Update Rate" button -> opens inline rate input
  |           |     |           +-- "Milestone Pay" button -> opens MilestonePayForm
  |           |     |           +-- "Remove" button (red, with confirmation dialog)
  |           |     +-- Empty state (when total_employees === 0):
  |           |           "No employees registered yet. Register your first employee above."
  |           |
  |           +-- MilestonePayForm.tsx (inline or modal, shown per employee)
  |           |     +-- Employee address display
  |           |     +-- Amount input (PAYUSD)
  |           |     +-- "Send Milestone Payment" button
  |           |
  |           +-- EmergencyControls.tsx (SpotlightCard wrapper, bottom of page)
  |                 +-- "Emergency: Pause All Streams" button (red, prominent)
  |                 |     Confirmation dialog: "This will freeze ALL active streams..."
  |                 +-- "Resume All Streams" button (shown when is_paused=1, STRETCH)
  |                 +-- Status text: "All streams active" or "All streams paused at [timestamp]"
  |
  +-- Toast.tsx (positioned top-right, stacking)
        Renders success/error notifications for all transactions.
```

### 3.3 Employee Dashboard (`/employee`)

```
EmployeeDashboard.tsx
  +-- Silk.tsx (same 3D background)
  |
  +-- <header> (fixed top bar)
  |     +-- Logo / "AlgoFlow" (link to /)
  |     +-- NetworkBadge.tsx
  |     +-- WalletConnect.tsx (connected address, disconnect)
  |
  +-- WalletConnect.tsx (full-page overlay if wallet not connected)
  |
  +-- Onboarding Card (conditional: shown when registered but not opted in)
  |     SpotlightCard wrapper
  |     +-- "You've been registered by [employer]!"
  |     +-- Rate preview: "$100.00/hr ($2,400.00/day | $16,800.00/week | $73,000.00/month)"
  |     +-- "Opt In to PAYUSD Token" button
  |     +-- "Opt In to AlgoFlow App" button
  |     +-- Progress indicator (0/2, 1/2, 2/2 opt-ins)
  |     Hidden once both opt-ins are complete.
  |
  +-- Not Registered Card (conditional: shown when wallet is not a registered employee)
  |     SpotlightCard wrapper
  |     +-- "Your wallet is not registered with any AlgoFlow contract."
  |     +-- "Ask your employer to register your address."
  |     +-- Displays connected wallet address
  |
  +-- <main> (centered, single-column layout optimized for the counter)
  |     +-- StreamCounter.tsx (SpotlightCard wrapper, HERO element)
  |     |     The centerpiece of the entire application.
  |     |     +-- Large monospace number: "$7,200.034722"
  |     |     |     Font: ui-monospace, large size (3-4rem)
  |     |     |     Color: --stream-green (#5dcaa5)
  |     |     |     Smooth CSS transition on each tick (transition: all 0.3s ease)
  |     |     |     Updates every 1 second via useStreamAccrual hook
  |     |     +-- Label: "Accrued Salary" (Fraunces Variable heading)
  |     |     +-- Subtext: "Earning $0.027778/second" (calculated from rate)
  |     |     +-- When paused: number frozen, amber overlay, "PAUSED" label
  |     |     +-- When globally paused: number frozen, red overlay, "PAUSED BY EMPLOYER"
  |     |
  |     +-- WithdrawButton.tsx
  |     |     +-- Large green button: "Withdraw All" with dollar amount
  |     |     |     Gentle pulse animation when accrued > 0.001 PAYUSD
  |     |     |     Disabled + greyed when accrued < 0.001 PAYUSD
  |     |     |     Disabled when stream is paused or globally paused
  |     |     +-- Confirmation panel (appears on click):
  |     |           "Withdraw $7,200.06 PAYUSD to your wallet?"
  |     |           "You will continue earning at $100.00/hr after withdrawal."
  |     |           [Confirm Withdrawal] [Cancel]
  |     |
  |     +-- RateDisplay.tsx (SpotlightCard wrapper)
  |     |     +-- Primary: "$100.00/hr" (large, Fraunces Variable)
  |     |     +-- Secondary row: "$2,400.00/day | $16,800.00/week | $73,000.00/month"
  |     |     +-- Conversion factors: daily=hourly*24, weekly=hourly*168, monthly=hourly*730
  |     |
  |     +-- StatusBadge.tsx
  |     |     +-- "Active" (green dot + text) or "Paused" (amber dot + text) or "Removed" (grey)
  |     |     +-- "New" badge (pulsing, --accent color): shown when salary_rate or is_active
  |     |     |     changed since last visit (compared against localStorage timestamp)
  |     |     +-- onClick on "New" badge: dismiss, update localStorage timestamp
  |     |
  |     +-- TransactionHistory.tsx (SpotlightCard wrapper)
  |           +-- Column headers: Date, Type, Amount, Explorer
  |           +-- Transaction rows (most recent first):
  |           |     +-- Timestamp (local timezone, "Mar 26, 2026 9:14 AM IST")
  |           |     +-- Type ("Withdrawal" | "Rate Settlement" | "Milestone" | "Final Payout")
  |           |     +-- Amount ("+$7,200.08 PAYUSD")
  |           |     +-- ExplorerLink.tsx ("View on Explorer" -> Lora Explorer)
  |           +-- Empty state: "No withdrawals yet. Your salary is accruing -- withdraw anytime!"
  |           +-- Pagination or "Show more" if many transactions
  |
  +-- Toast.tsx (positioned top-right)
```

---

## 4. User Flow Diagrams

### 4.1 Journey 1: First-Time Employer Setup

```
[Landing /]
  |-- Click "I'm an Employer" -->
[Landing / -- WalletConnect prompt]
  |-- Connect Pera/KMD wallet -->
[Employer /employer -- SetupChecklist visible]
  |  Step 1: Contract Deployed (check mark, via deploy script in terminal)
  |
  |-- Click "Opt In to PAYUSD" + sign tx -->
[Employer /employer -- SetupChecklist step 2 complete]
  |  Toast: "Contract opted in to PAYUSD -- Tx: 7X2K...R9M4"
  |
  |-- Enter 100,000 in FundForm + click "Fund Contract" + sign atomic group -->
[Employer /employer -- SetupChecklist step 3 complete]
  |  ContractHealth: "$100,000.00 PAYUSD"
  |  Toast: "Funded $100,000.00 -- Tx: FD42...N8P1"
  |
  |-- Enter Alice address + $100/hr in RegisterForm + click "Register" + sign -->
[Employer /employer -- SetupChecklist step 4 complete, checklist hidden]
  |  EmployeeList: Alice row appears (Active, $100/hr, $0.00)
  |  Toast: "Registered Alice -- Tx: RE91...K3J7"
  |
  |-- Enter Bob + Carol in batch mode + click "Batch Register" + sign atomic group -->
[Employer /employer -- Full dashboard with 3 employees streaming]
   ContractHealth: Runway ~303 hours at $330/hr
   EmployeeList: Alice ($100/hr), Bob ($150/hr), Carol ($80/hr) -- all Active
```

### 4.2 Journey 2: Daily Employer Operations

```
[Landing /]
  |-- Wallet auto-reconnects from localStorage -->
  |-- Role detection: activeAddress === employer -->
[Employer /employer -- Dashboard loads in <2s]
  |  EmployeeList: Alice $12,000, Bob $18,000, Carol $9,600 (ticking)
  |  ContractHealth: $60,400 balance, ~183h runway
  |
  |-- Click "Update Rate" on Bob + enter $200/hr + sign -->
[Employer /employer -- Bob's row updates]
  |  Bob: "$200/hr, Active, Accrued: $0.00" (settled $18,000 at old rate)
  |  Toast: "Bob's rate updated to $200/hr. Settled $18,000.00"
  |  Runway recalculates: $42,400 / $380/hr = ~111h
  |
  |-- Click "Pause" on Carol + sign -->
[Employer /employer -- Carol paused]
  |  Carol: status changes to "Paused" (amber)
  |  Toast: "Carol's stream paused. Settled $9,600.00"
  |  Runway: $32,800 / $300/hr = ~109h
  |
  |-- Click "Milestone Pay" on Alice + enter $5,000 + sign -->
[Employer /employer -- Milestone sent]
   Toast: "Milestone payment of $5,000.00 sent to Alice. Tx: M8P2...K4J7"
   Alice's stream continues uninterrupted
```

### 4.3 Journey 3: Emergency Stop

```
[Employer /employer -- 2 active streams (Alice, Bob), Carol already paused]
  |
  |-- Click "Emergency: Pause All Streams" -->
[Employer /employer -- Confirmation dialog]
  |  "This will freeze ALL active streams. Are you sure?"
  |
  |-- Click "Confirm" + sign -->
[Employer /employer -- Global pause active]
  |  All rows show "PAUSED (Global)" in red
  |  EmergencyControls: "All streams paused" + timestamp
  |  Toast: "Emergency pause activated. Tx: EP91...X3R2"
  |
  |-- (Meanwhile) Alice on /employee clicks "Withdraw All" -->
[Employee /employee -- Withdrawal rejected]
  |  Toast error: "System is paused by employer. Withdrawals temporarily disabled."
  |
  |-- Employer clicks "Resume All Streams" (STRETCH) or resumes individually -->
[Employer /employer -- Streams resumed]
   All previously active streams resume from current timestamp
   No retroactive accrual for paused period
```

### 4.4 Journey 4: Employee Off-boarding

```
[Employer /employer -- Bob at $200/hr, Accrued: $14,400]
  |
  |-- Click "Remove" on Bob's row -->
[Employer /employer -- Confirmation dialog]
  |  "Remove Bob (B7X2...K9M4)? This will:
  |   (1) Settle $14,400.00
  |   (2) Permanently deregister
  |   (3) Free local state slot
  |   This cannot be undone."
  |
  |-- Click "Confirm and Remove" + sign -->
[Employer /employer -- Bob removed]
  |  EmployeeList: 2 entries (Alice, Carol)
  |  Toast: "Bob removed. Final payout: $14,400.00. Tx: RB42...N7P1"
  |  ContractHealth: Runway recalculates with reduced burn rate
  |
  |-- (Meanwhile) Bob on /employee -->
[Employee /employee -- Bob sees "Removed" status]
   StreamCounter: frozen
   TransactionHistory: shows final settlement of $14,400
   Status: "Removed" (grey)
```

### 4.5 Journey 5: First-Time Employee Onboarding

```
[Landing /]
  |-- Click "I'm an Employee" -->
[Landing / -- WalletConnect prompt]
  |-- Connect Pera wallet -->
  |-- Role detection: activeAddress !== employer -->
[Employee /employee -- Onboarding Card visible]
  |  "You've been registered by Raj's DAO!"
  |  "Rate: $100.00/hr ($2,400/day | $16,800/week | $73,000/month)"
  |  Two buttons: "Opt In to PAYUSD Token" / "Opt In to AlgoFlow App"
  |
  |-- Click "Opt In to PAYUSD Token" + sign in Pera -->
[Employee /employee -- 1/2 opt-ins complete]
  |  Toast: "Opted in to PAYUSD. Tx: OI41...H8K2"
  |
  |-- Click "Opt In to AlgoFlow App" + sign in Pera -->
[Employee /employee -- 2/2 opt-ins complete, onboarding card hidden]
  |  Toast: "Opted in to AlgoFlow. Tx: AO72...P5M9"
  |
[Employee /employee -- Full dashboard, StreamCounter visible]
   StreamCounter: "$0.027778" ticking up every second
   RateDisplay: "$100.00/hr | $2,400.00/day | $16,800.00/week | $73,000.00/month"
   StatusBadge: "Active" (green)
   TransactionHistory: "No withdrawals yet. Your salary is accruing -- withdraw anytime!"
```

### 4.6 Journey 6: Employee Withdrawal

```
[Employee /employee -- StreamCounter showing $7,200.03 (and counting)]
  |
  |-- Click "Withdraw All" button -->
[Employee /employee -- Confirmation panel]
  |  "Withdraw $7,200.06 PAYUSD to your wallet?"
  |  "You will continue earning at $100.00/hr after withdrawal."
  |
  |-- Click "Confirm Withdrawal" -->
[Employee /employee -- Loading state: "Waiting for wallet signature..."]
  |-- Sign in Pera -->
[Employee /employee -- Loading state: "Confirming transaction..."]
  |-- ~3.3s Algorand finality -->
[Employee /employee -- Withdrawal complete]
   StreamCounter: resets to "$0.00", immediately begins ticking again
   Toast: "Withdrawn $7,200.08 PAYUSD! Tx: WD93...F2K8" (with explorer link)
   TransactionHistory: new row at top:
     "Mar 26, 2026 9:14 AM IST | Withdrawal | +$7,200.08 PAYUSD | View on Explorer"
```

### 4.7 Journey 7: Employee Rate Change Discovery

```
[Employee /employee -- Alice returns after 3 days]
  |-- Wallet auto-reconnects -->
  |-- Dashboard loads, compares on-chain state to localStorage last-visit -->
[Employee /employee -- "New" badge detected]
  |  StatusBadge: "New" badge pulsing next to rate
  |  RateDisplay: "$120.00/hr" (was $100.00/hr)
  |  StreamCounter: "$5,760.00" ticking at $0.033333/second (faster than before)
  |  TransactionHistory: "Mar 24, 2026 2:30 PM IST | Rate Settlement | +$4,800.00 PAYUSD"
  |
  |-- Click "New" badge to dismiss -->
[Employee /employee -- Badge dismissed]
   localStorage last-visit updated
   Badge will not reappear unless another change occurs
```

### 4.8 Journey 8: Live Demo Flow (Hackathon Presentation)

```
[0:00] Terminal: deploy script creates PAYUSD ASA
         Judges see token on Lora Explorer
  |
[0:15] Terminal: deploy script deploys PayrollStream contract
         Contract App ID visible on explorer
  |
[0:30] Employer /employer: Enter 100,000, click "Fund Contract", sign
         ContractHealth: "$100,000.00 PAYUSD"
         Judges see atomic transfer on explorer
  |
[0:45] Employer /employer: Enter Employee A address + $100/hr, "Register", sign
         EmployeeList: Employee A appears (Active, $100/hr, $0.00)
  |
[1:00] Employer /employer: Enter B ($150/hr) + C ($80/hr), "Batch Register", sign
         All 3 employees appear simultaneously (atomic group)
         Runway: "~303 hours at $330/hr"
  |
[1:15] Switch tab -> Employee /employee (Employee A's wallet)
         StreamCounter: $0.03... $0.06... $0.08... ticking visibly
         THIS IS THE "WOW" MOMENT -- judges watch money accrue in real time
  |
[1:45] Employee /employee: Click "Withdraw All" (~$0.83), sign
         Toast: "Withdrawn $0.83 PAYUSD!" with explorer link
         Counter resets to $0.00, starts ticking again
         Click explorer link -> judges verify inner AssetTransfer
  |
[2:15] Switch tab -> Employer /employer: "Update Rate" on B to $200/hr, sign
         B: settled $X at $150/hr, now "$200/hr, Accrued: $0.00"
         Toast: "Rate updated. Settled $X at previous rate."
  |
[2:30] Employer /employer: "Pause" on C, sign
         C: status -> "Paused", accrued settled
  |
[2:45] (Bonus) Employer /employer: "Milestone Pay" to A, $500, sign
         Toast: "Milestone $500 sent to Employee A"
         A's stream continues uninterrupted alongside milestone
```

---

## 5. Shared Components Inventory

| Component | Used On | Props | Internal State | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|-------|----------------|---------|
| **SpotlightCard** | All pages | `children`, `className?`, `as?` (HTML tag) | `mouseX`, `mouseY` (CSS custom properties via mousemove listener) | Glassmorphism card with mouse-following radial gradient highlight. `backdrop-filter: blur(18px)`, semi-transparent border, layered shadow. |
| **ShinyText** | Landing (hero), Employer (headings), Employee (counter label) | `children`, `className?`, `speed?` (animation duration) | None (pure CSS animation) | Shimmer gradient text effect. Background-clip animation at 200% width, 5s linear infinite loop. Applied to key headings and the AlgoFlow brand text. |
| **Silk** | All pages (rendered once at App level) | `color?` (base color, default --bg-dark), `speed?` (animation speed) | Three.js scene, camera, renderer, time uniform | Full-viewport Three.js procedural 3D background. Fragment shader with noise function + time uniform. Fixed position, z-index: 0. Dark green/black palette. |
| **WalletConnect** | All pages | `onConnect?` (callback), `showPrompt?` (boolean) | `isConnecting`, `error` | Wallet connection handler. Shows Pera QR code on Testnet, KMD dropdown on LocalNet. Displays connected address (truncated) with disconnect option. Full-page overlay mode when wallet not connected on dashboard routes. |
| **NetworkBadge** | All pages | `network` (from VITE_NETWORK) | None | Pill-shaped badge showing "Testnet" (blue) or "LocalNet" (amber). Fixed position in header. |
| **ExplorerLink** | Employer (toasts, employee rows), Employee (transaction history, toasts) | `txId` (transaction ID), `network` ("testnet" or "localnet"), `label?` | None | Builds URL to Lora Explorer for Testnet (`https://lora.algokit.io/testnet/transaction/{txId}`) or displays raw txId for LocalNet. Opens in new tab. |
| **Toast** | All pages | Wraps `react-hot-toast` or similar | Toast queue | Toast notification container. Positioned top-right. Supports success (green), error (red), info (blue) variants. Each toast includes message text, optional tx ID, optional explorer link, auto-dismiss after 5s, manual dismiss. |
| **LoadingSkeleton** | Employer (EmployeeList, ContractHealth), Employee (StreamCounter, TransactionHistory) | `width?`, `height?`, `lines?` | None | Animated placeholder while data is loading. Pulsing grey bars matching the glassmorphism card dimensions. Replaced by real content once Algod queries complete. |
| **StatusBadge** | Employer (EmployeeRow), Employee (main view) | `status` ("active" / "paused" / "paused_global" / "removed"), `isNew?` (boolean) | None | Colored status indicator. Active = green dot + "Active". Paused = amber dot + "Paused". Global pause = red dot + "PAUSED (Global)". Removed = grey dot + "Removed". Optional pulsing "New" badge in --accent color. |

---

## 6. State Requirements Per Page

### 6.1 Landing Page

| State Needed | Source | Update Frequency | Notes |
|-------------|--------|-----------------|-------|
| `network` | `VITE_NETWORK` env var | Static (build-time) | Determines NetworkBadge text and wallet provider selection |
| `appId` | `VITE_APP_ID` env var | Static (build-time) | If unset, disable auto-routing; show manual role selector only |
| `activeAddress` | `useWallet()` hook | On connect/disconnect | null until wallet connected; triggers role detection on change |
| `isConnected` | `useWallet()` hook | On connect/disconnect | Controls WalletConnect button state |
| `employerAddress` | Algod global state query (only after wallet connects) | Once on connect | Compared against activeAddress for role routing |

### 6.2 Employer Dashboard

| State Needed | Source | Update Frequency | Notes |
|-------------|--------|-----------------|-------|
| `activeAddress` | `useWallet()` hook | On connect/disconnect | Must match employer global state |
| `globalState.employer` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Auth check: activeAddress must equal this |
| `globalState.salary_asset` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Asset ID for all ASA operations |
| `globalState.total_employees` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Displayed in ContractHealth |
| `globalState.total_streamed` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Lifetime disbursement counter |
| `globalState.is_paused` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Controls EmergencyControls display and EmployeeRow status |
| `contractPayusdBalance` | Algod account info query | Every 5 seconds | Displayed in ContractHealth, used for runway calculation |
| `contractAlgoBalance` | Algod account info query | Every 5 seconds | Displayed in ContractHealth |
| `employerPayusdBalance` | Algod account info query | Every 5 seconds | Shown in FundForm ("Available: $X") |
| `employees[]` | Algod local state for each employee address | Every 5 seconds | Array of { address, salary_rate, stream_start, last_withdrawal, total_withdrawn, is_active } |
| `setupComplete` | Derived (contract opted in + balance > 0 + employees > 0) | Derived from global state | Controls SetupChecklist visibility |
| `runway` | Derived (contractBalance / sum of active rates) | Derived | Hours and days until depletion |
| `isLoading` | Local useState per operation | On user interaction | Loading flags for fund, register, pause, resume, update, remove, milestone |
| `formInputs` | Local useState | On user input | FundForm amount, RegisterForm addresses/rates, MilestonePayForm amount |

### 6.3 Employee Dashboard

| State Needed | Source | Update Frequency | Notes |
|-------------|--------|-----------------|-------|
| `activeAddress` | `useWallet()` hook | On connect/disconnect | Employee's wallet address |
| `localState.salary_rate` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Used for rate display and client-side accrual calculation |
| `localState.stream_start` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Start of current streaming period |
| `localState.last_withdrawal` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Anchor for accrual calculation |
| `localState.total_withdrawn` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Displayed in summary stats |
| `localState.is_active` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Controls counter ticking and withdraw button |
| `globalState.is_paused` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Global pause blocks withdrawals |
| `globalState.salary_asset` | Algod (useContractState) | Every 5 seconds | Asset ID for opt-in |
| `displayedAccrual` | `useStreamAccrual()` hook (client-side timer) | Every 1 second | The real-time ticking counter value |
| `baseAccrual` | Algod `get_accrued()` read-only call | On load + every 30 seconds | Sync point to prevent drift |
| `transactionHistory[]` | Indexer (filtered by app ID + employee address + "algoflow:" note) | On page load, after withdrawal | Array of { timestamp, type, amount, txId } |
| `lastVisitTimestamp` | localStorage | On page load | Compared against on-chain state timestamps for "New" badge |
| `hasOptedInAsa` | Algod account info (asset holdings check) | On page load | Controls onboarding card visibility |
| `hasOptedInApp` | Algod account info (app local state existence check) | On page load | Controls onboarding card visibility |
| `isRegistered` | Derived (salary_rate > 0) | Derived from local state | Controls "not registered" message vs dashboard |
| `isWithdrawing` | Local useState | On user interaction | Loading state for withdrawal flow |

---

## 7. Empty States

### 7.1 Landing Page

No empty state. The landing page always renders its full content (Silk background, How It Works diagram, Role Selector) regardless of contract deployment status. If no contract is deployed (APP_ID unset), the role selector buttons still work but skip auto-routing -- they navigate directly to the selected dashboard, where the wallet connection and further state checks occur.

### 7.2 Employer Dashboard -- Zero Employees

**Trigger**: Contract deployed and funded, but `total_employees === 0`.

**Display**: The SetupChecklist remains visible with steps 1-3 checked and step 4 ("Register First Employee") highlighted as the current action. The EmployeeList shows an empty state card:

- Heading: "No Employees Registered"
- Body: "Register your first employee to start streaming salary. Enter their Algorand address and hourly rate above."
- Visual: Muted illustration or icon suggesting adding a person
- CTA: Arrow pointing up toward the RegisterForm component

The ContractHealth panel is fully populated (balance, ALGO, etc.) but the runway shows "No active streams" instead of a numeric value. The EmergencyControls section is hidden (no streams to pause).

### 7.3 Employer Dashboard -- Setup Incomplete

**Trigger**: Contract deployed but ASA opt-in not done, or no funding.

**Display**: The SetupChecklist occupies the main content area as the primary UI element. Each step shows:
- Step number and description
- Check mark (green) if complete, circle (grey) if pending, arrow (highlighted) if current
- Action button for the current step (e.g., "Opt In to PAYUSD", "Fund Contract")

The EmployeeList, FundForm, RegisterForm, and EmergencyControls are either hidden or visually muted (low opacity) until all prerequisite steps are complete.

### 7.4 Employee Dashboard -- Not Registered

**Trigger**: Wallet connected, but the address has no local state in the contract (salary_rate === 0 or no local state entry).

**Display**: A single centered SpotlightCard:

- Heading: "Not Registered"
- Body: "Your wallet address is not registered with any AlgoFlow payroll contract. Ask your employer to register your address to start receiving streaming salary."
- Displayed address: connected wallet address (truncated)
- No StreamCounter, no WithdrawButton, no RateDisplay, no TransactionHistory

### 7.5 Employee Dashboard -- Registered but Not Opted In

**Trigger**: Employer has called `register_employee` with this address, but the employee has not completed ASA opt-in or app opt-in.

**Display**: The Onboarding Card (see Section 3.3) with opt-in buttons. The StreamCounter, WithdrawButton, and other main dashboard elements are hidden until opt-ins are complete. Rate preview is shown to confirm the registration.

### 7.6 Employee Dashboard -- Zero Withdrawals

**Trigger**: Employee is actively streaming but has never withdrawn.

**Display**: StreamCounter is ticking, WithdrawButton is active, RateDisplay and StatusBadge are populated. The TransactionHistory section shows:

- Heading: "Transaction History"
- Empty state message: "No withdrawals yet. Your salary is accruing -- withdraw anytime!"
- Muted icon or illustration suggesting a first withdrawal

### 7.7 Employee Dashboard -- Removed

**Trigger**: Employer has called `remove_employee` for this address.

**Display**: StreamCounter is frozen at $0.00 (or last known value). StatusBadge shows "Removed" (grey). WithdrawButton is disabled. TransactionHistory shows the final settlement as the last entry. A banner may read: "Your stream has been terminated by the employer. Final settlement has been processed."

---

## 8. Error States

### 8.1 All Pages -- Wallet Not Connected

**Trigger**: User navigates to `/employer` or `/employee` without a connected wallet.

**Display**: Full-page overlay with WalletConnect component centered on the Silk background. The overlay blocks all dashboard interactions until a wallet is connected.

- Heading: "Connect Your Wallet"
- Subtext: "Connect your Algorand wallet to access the dashboard."
- Pera QR code (Testnet) or KMD account dropdown (LocalNet)
- "Cancel" option returns to landing page

### 8.2 All Pages -- Wallet Connection Failed

**Trigger**: Pera WalletConnect handshake times out, user rejects in Pera, or KMD daemon unreachable.

**Display**: Toast error notification:
- Pera rejection: "Could not connect to Pera Wallet. Please ensure your wallet app is open and try again."
- KMD failure: "Could not connect to KMD. Ensure AlgoKit LocalNet is running."
- Retry button available in toast.
- Dashboard remains in "connect wallet" state.

### 8.3 All Pages -- Network Error

**Trigger**: Algod node unreachable, Indexer down, DNS failure, timeout.

**Display**: Toast error: "Network error. Please check your connection and try again." with retry button. If persistent (3 consecutive failures with exponential backoff), a banner appears at the top of the page: "Unable to reach the Algorand network. Some data may be outdated." Dashboard continues to display last-known cached state.

### 8.4 All Pages -- Contract Not Found

**Trigger**: VITE_APP_ID is set but the application does not exist on-chain (deleted or wrong network).

**Display**: Full-page error card:
- Heading: "Contract Not Found"
- Body: "The AlgoFlow contract (App ID: {appId}) was not found on {network}. Please verify the contract has been deployed and you are connected to the correct network."
- Action: "Go to Landing Page" button

### 8.5 Employer Dashboard -- Transaction Failed

**Trigger**: Any contract method call fails (fund, register, pause, resume, update, remove, milestone, opt-in).

**Display**: Toast error with human-readable message mapped from contract error pattern (see Section 8.8). The UI reverts to its pre-action state. Form inputs are preserved. All error toasts include a "Retry" button.

### 8.6 Employee Dashboard -- Withdrawal Failed

**Trigger**: `withdraw()` call fails.

**Display**:
- User rejected in wallet: Toast "Transaction cancelled. No changes made." Counter continues ticking.
- Global pause: Toast "System paused by employer. Withdrawals temporarily disabled. Please try again later." Counter frozen.
- Zero accrual: Toast "No salary has accrued yet. Try again later." Withdraw button remains disabled.
- Overdraft (partial): Toast "Partial withdrawal: $X of $Y. Stream paused -- insufficient contract funds. Contact your employer." Counter freezes, status changes to "Paused".
- Network error: Toast "Network error. Please check your connection and retry." Counter continues ticking (client-side).

### 8.7 Employee Dashboard -- Opt-In Failed

**Trigger**: ASA opt-in or app opt-in transaction fails.

**Display**:
- Insufficient ALGO: Toast "Insufficient ALGO balance. You need at least 0.2 ALGO for opt-in fees. Fund your wallet from the Algorand faucet."
- User rejected: Toast "Transaction cancelled. You can opt in when ready."
- Network error: Toast "Network error. Please try again."
- The onboarding card remains visible with the failed step still actionable.

### 8.8 Contract Error-to-Message Mapping

| Contract Error Pattern | User-Facing Toast Message |
|-----------------------|---------------------------|
| `"Only employer"` | "You are not authorized. Only the employer can perform this action." |
| `"Already registered"` | "This employee is already registered." |
| `"not active"` / `"paused"` | "This stream is currently paused." |
| `"System is paused"` | "All streams are paused by the employer. Try again later." |
| `"Nothing to withdraw"` | "No salary has accrued yet. Try again later." |
| `"Insufficient"` | "The contract does not have enough funds." |
| `"rejected"` / `"cancelled"` | "Transaction cancelled by user." |
| `"overspend"` | "Insufficient funds. Please check your balance." |
| `"timeout"` / `"network"` | "Network error. Please check your connection and retry." |
| Other assertion | "Transaction rejected by the contract. Please try again." |

---

## 9. Loading States

### 9.1 Wallet Connecting

**Trigger**: User initiates wallet connection.

**Display**:
- WalletConnect component shows spinner with "Connecting..."
- Pera: QR code displayed, text "Scan with Pera Wallet"
- KMD: Dropdown with spinner, text "Connecting to KMD..."
- Duration: 1-10 seconds typically (Pera requires phone interaction)

### 9.2 Fetching Contract State (Initial Page Load)

**Trigger**: Dashboard route loads, Algod queries begin.

**Display**:
- **Employer**: ContractHealth card shows LoadingSkeleton (3 animated bars for balance, runway, employees). EmployeeList shows LoadingSkeleton rows (3 placeholder rows matching EmployeeRow dimensions). FundForm and RegisterForm are interactive immediately (no data dependency).
- **Employee**: StreamCounter shows LoadingSkeleton (large placeholder bar for the counter). RateDisplay shows LoadingSkeleton. TransactionHistory shows LoadingSkeleton (3 placeholder rows). WithdrawButton is disabled during load.
- Duration: typically 1-2 seconds (Algod query + parse)

### 9.3 Transaction Pending (Building)

**Trigger**: User clicks an action button, transaction is being constructed.

**Display**:
- Clicked button transitions to disabled state with spinner icon
- Button text changes: "Fund Contract" -> "Preparing..."
- Other action buttons remain interactive (no global lock)
- Duration: <200ms (local computation only)

### 9.4 Transaction Signing (Waiting for Wallet)

**Trigger**: Transaction encoded and sent to wallet for signing.

**Display**:
- Button text: "Waiting for signature..."
- Spinner continues
- Pera: user must approve on phone (can take 5-30 seconds)
- KMD: instant (no user interaction needed, <1 second)
- If user takes no action for 60 seconds, show timeout hint: "Please check your wallet app"

### 9.5 Transaction Confirming (On-Chain)

**Trigger**: Signed transaction submitted to Algod, waiting for block confirmation.

**Display**:
- Button text: "Confirming..."
- Spinner continues
- Expected duration: ~3.3 seconds (Algorand finality)
- On success: button returns to default state, toast appears
- On failure: button returns to default state, error toast appears

### 9.6 Withdrawal Confirming (Employee)

**Trigger**: Employee signs withdrawal, awaiting confirmation.

**Display**:
- WithdrawButton: "Confirming withdrawal..." with spinner
- StreamCounter: continues ticking (client-side, not blocked)
- On success: counter resets to $0.00, new history row appears, toast with explorer link
- On failure: counter continues (no state change), error toast

### 9.7 State Polling (Background)

**Trigger**: Automatic 5-second polling interval fires.

**Display**: No visible loading indicator. State updates are seamless -- values transition smoothly to new data. If a poll fails, it silently retries on the next interval. Only after 3 consecutive failures does a network error banner appear.

---

## 10. Wireframe Descriptions

### 10.1 Landing Page Layout

**Overall**: Full-viewport dark page (#0a0f0d). Silk 3D background fills the entire viewport as a fixed canvas at z-index 0. All content floats above with z-index 1+. Centered single-column layout, max-width ~960px, with generous vertical spacing.

**Header Bar** (fixed, top, full-width):
- Left: "AlgoFlow" brand text rendered with ShinyText shimmer animation. Fraunces Variable font, ~24px, letter-spacing -0.03em. Color cycles through gradient of --stream-green to --primary.
- Right: NetworkBadge pill (small, 12px font, rounded-full, background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1), text: --text-light). Beside it, WalletConnect button (outlined, rounded, "Connect Wallet" text or truncated address if connected).
- Height: ~64px. Background: transparent or very subtle rgba(10,15,13,0.5) backdrop blur.

**Hero Section** (top of main content, vertically centered in upper third):
- Headline: "Real-Time Payroll Streaming on Algorand" -- ShinyText component, Fraunces Variable, 48-56px on desktop, centered. Shimmer gradient animates left-to-right continuously.
- Subtitle: "Employers fund a smart contract. Salaries accrue every second. Employees withdraw anytime." -- Geist Variable, 18px, --text-light at 70% opacity, max-width 600px, centered.
- Vertical spacing: 24px between headline and subtitle, 48px below subtitle to next section.

**How It Works Section**:
- Three SpotlightCards arranged horizontally (flex row, gap: 24px). Each card is ~280px wide, equal height.
- Card 1: Icon (wallet/fund icon), "Employer Funds Contract" heading (Fraunces, 20px), description text (Geist, 14px, --text-light at 80%). Glassmorphism: backdrop-filter blur(18px), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.24), shadow 0 28px 80px rgba(6,12,8,0.28).
- Arrow connector between cards: simple SVG line or CSS border, color rgba(255,255,255,0.2).
- Card 2: Icon (stream/flow icon), "Salary Streams Every Second" heading, description.
- Arrow connector.
- Card 3: Icon (withdraw/wallet icon), "Withdraw Anytime" heading, description.
- Each card has spotlight hover effect: radial gradient follows mouse position within the card via CSS custom properties --mouse-x, --mouse-y.

**Role Selector Section** (below How It Works, 48px vertical gap):
- Two SpotlightCards side by side (flex row, gap: 24px, max-width 640px, centered).
- Card 1 ("I'm an Employer"): Icon (briefcase), heading (Fraunces, 24px), "Manage payroll, register employees, fund contracts" description (Geist, 14px). Green CTA button at bottom: "Get Started" with --primary background, white text, rounded, hover -> --primary-dark.
- Card 2 ("I'm an Employee"): Icon (person/user), heading (Fraunces, 24px), "View your salary streaming in real time" description. Green CTA button: "View Dashboard".
- Both cards trigger wallet connection on click, then navigate to respective route.

**Footer** (optional, bottom of page, 48px top margin):
- "Built on Algorand" text, centered, Geist Variable, 14px, --text-light at 50% opacity.
- Hackathon attribution: "AlgoFlow -- Infinova Hackathon 2026".

### 10.2 Employer Dashboard Layout

**Overall**: Dark background (#0a0f0d) with Silk 3D canvas. Content area has max-width ~1200px, centered. Two-column grid layout on desktop (left: 40% management tools, right: 60% employee list). Cards use glassmorphism with spotlight effects.

**Header Bar** (identical structure to landing page):
- Left: "AlgoFlow" logo/text (ShinyText, links to /).
- Center: (optional) "Employer Dashboard" label in --text-light at 60% opacity.
- Right: NetworkBadge + WalletConnect (shows truncated employer address + "Disconnect" dropdown).

**Setup Checklist** (conditional, replaces main content when setup incomplete):
- Full-width SpotlightCard, max-width ~640px, centered.
- 4 steps listed vertically. Each step: number circle (green check or grey), step title, brief description, action button (for current step).
- Progress bar at top: 0-4 segments filled.
- When all 4 complete: checklist fades out with animation, reveals full dashboard.

**Left Column -- Management Tools** (when setup complete):

- **ContractHealth** (SpotlightCard, full width of left column):
  - Top row: Large PAYUSD balance ("$100,000.00", monospace, --stream-green, 28px). Beside it: ALGO balance (smaller, 16px, --text-light at 70%).
  - Runway bar: horizontal progress bar, width proportional to days remaining. Green (>7 days), amber (1-7 days), red (<1 day). Text overlay: "Runway: ~303 hours (~12.6 days)".
  - Low-fund warning: conditional red banner below bar when runway < 24h. Background: --accent at 15% opacity. Text: "Low Funds: Less than 24h runway remaining. Fund the contract immediately."
  - Stats row: "Employees: 3 | Total Streamed: $39,600.00 | Status: Active"
  - Padding: 24px. Border-radius: 16px.

- **FundForm** (SpotlightCard, below ContractHealth, 16px gap):
  - Label: "Fund Contract" (Fraunces, 20px).
  - Input field: number input, placeholder "Enter PAYUSD amount", rounded, dark background (#111316), light border, text --text-light.
  - Helper text: "Available in wallet: $250,000.00 PAYUSD"
  - Button: "Fund Contract" (--primary background, white text, full-width, rounded, 44px height).

- **RegisterForm** (SpotlightCard, below FundForm, 16px gap):
  - Label: "Register Employee" (Fraunces, 20px).
  - Mode tabs: "Single" / "Batch" toggle (pill-shaped, --surface-dark background, active tab --primary).
  - Single mode: Address input (full width) + Rate input ($/hr, half width) + "Register" button.
  - Batch mode: 3 rows of Address + Rate inputs, "Batch Register (Atomic)" button.
  - Address validation: red border + "Invalid Algorand address" if malformed. Rate validation: red border + "Rate must be > 0" if zero.

**Right Column -- Employee Management**:

- **EmployeeList** (SpotlightCard, full height of right column):
  - Header row: "Employees" heading (Fraunces, 20px) + employee count badge.
  - Column labels: Employee | Rate | Status | Accrued | Actions (Geist, 12px, --text-light at 50%, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.05em).
  - **EmployeeRow** (repeated, 3 rows for demo):
    - Left: Truncated address (ExplorerLink, monospace, "ABC123...XY78", clickable, --stream-green). Below: full address tooltip on hover.
    - Rate: "$100.00/hr" (monospace, --text-light).
    - Status: StatusBadge ("Active" green dot, "Paused" amber dot).
    - Accrued: "$12,000.00" (monospace, --stream-green, updates with polling).
    - Actions: Row of icon buttons (small, 32px square, icon + tooltip):
      - Pause icon (shown when active) / Resume icon (shown when paused)
      - Edit icon (Update Rate) -> reveals inline input + confirm
      - Gift icon (Milestone Pay) -> reveals inline amount input + confirm
      - Trash icon (Remove, --accent red) -> confirmation dialog
    - Row divider: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08).
    - Row height: ~64px. Hover: row background brightens slightly.
  - Empty state: centered text + icon when no employees (see Section 7.2).

**EmergencyControls** (SpotlightCard, below both columns, full-width):
- Border: 1px solid rgba(242,95,108,0.3) (subtle --accent border for urgency).
- Left: Status text "All streams active" (green) or "All streams paused at Mar 23, 2026 3:15 PM" (red).
- Right: "Emergency: Pause All Streams" button (--accent background, white text, 44px height, prominent). When paused: "Resume All Streams" button (--primary background) replaces it.
- Confirmation dialog (modal overlay): "This will freeze ALL active streams. Employees will not be able to withdraw until streams are resumed. Are you sure?" with "Confirm" (--accent) and "Cancel" buttons.

### 10.3 Employee Dashboard Layout

**Overall**: Dark background with Silk 3D canvas. Single-column centered layout, max-width ~720px. The StreamCounter is the visual centerpiece, occupying the upper-center of the viewport. Design optimized for the "wow" moment -- the counter must be impossible to miss.

**Header Bar** (same structure as other pages):
- Left: "AlgoFlow" logo/text (ShinyText, links to /).
- Right: NetworkBadge + WalletConnect (truncated employee address + "Disconnect").

**Onboarding Card** (conditional, centered, replaces main content when opt-ins needed):
- SpotlightCard, max-width ~560px.
- Heading: "Welcome to AlgoFlow!" (Fraunces, 28px, ShinyText shimmer).
- Body: "You've been registered by [employer truncated]! Your salary rate is $100.00/hr."
- Rate preview: "$2,400.00/day | $16,800.00/week | $73,000.00/month" (Geist, 14px, --text-light).
- Two large buttons stacked vertically:
  - "Opt In to PAYUSD Token" (--primary, full width, 44px).
  - "Opt In to AlgoFlow App" (--primary, full width, 44px).
  - Each shows check mark after completion, disables when done.
- Progress: "1 of 2 complete" bar.

**Not Registered Card** (conditional, centered):
- SpotlightCard, max-width ~560px.
- Heading: "Not Registered" (Fraunces, 24px).
- Body text explaining to contact employer.
- Connected address displayed (monospace, truncated).

**Main Dashboard** (shown when registered and opted in):

- **StreamCounter** (SpotlightCard, prominent hero placement):
  - Occupies top ~40% of viewport. Extra-large padding (48px vertical, 32px horizontal).
  - Label above counter: "Accrued Salary" (Fraunces, 16px, --text-light at 60%, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.1em).
  - Counter value: "$7,200.034722" -- monospace font (ui-monospace), 48-64px on desktop, color --stream-green (#5dcaa5), font-weight 600. CSS transition: `all 0.3s ease` for smooth number interpolation between ticks.
  - Subtext below counter: "Earning $0.027778/second" (Geist, 14px, --text-light at 50%).
  - 6 decimal places always displayed (matches PAYUSD 6-decimal precision).
  - When paused: counter value freezes. Overlay with amber tint. "PAUSED" text in --accent. Subtext changes to "Stream paused. Contact your employer."
  - When globally paused: same freeze behavior but "PAUSED BY EMPLOYER" in red. Subtext: "All streams frozen. Withdrawals disabled."
  - Card has extra-strong spotlight effect -- wider gradient radius, higher opacity.

- **WithdrawButton** (directly below StreamCounter, 24px gap):
  - Large button, max-width ~360px, centered.
  - Active state: --primary background, white text "Withdraw All ($7,200.03)", 52px height, rounded-xl. Gentle pulse animation (scale 1.0 -> 1.02, 2s ease infinite).
  - Disabled state: grey background (#333), muted text, no animation. Shown when accrued < 0.001 PAYUSD or when paused.
  - Confirmation panel (reveals below button on click):
    - "Withdraw $7,200.06 PAYUSD to your wallet?"
    - "You will continue earning at $100.00/hr after withdrawal."
    - Two buttons: "Confirm Withdrawal" (--primary) and "Cancel" (ghost/outline).
  - Loading states: "Waiting for signature..." -> "Confirming..." (see Section 9).

- **RateDisplay** (SpotlightCard, below WithdrawButton, 24px gap):
  - Primary rate: "$100.00/hr" (Fraunces, 28px, --text-light).
  - Secondary rates row: "$2,400.00/day | $16,800.00/week | $73,000.00/month" (Geist, 14px, --text-light at 70%). Separated by vertical pipe characters.
  - Conversion factors: daily = hourly * 24, weekly = hourly * 168, monthly = hourly * 730.

- **StatusBadge** (inline with RateDisplay or adjacent):
  - "Active" with green dot (8px circle, --stream-green background, box-shadow glow).
  - "Paused" with amber dot.
  - "New" badge: small pill beside rate or status, pulsing --accent background, white text "New", 10px font. CSS animation: opacity 0.6 -> 1.0, 1.5s ease infinite. Clickable: dismisses and updates localStorage.

- **TransactionHistory** (SpotlightCard, below RateDisplay, 24px gap):
  - Heading: "Transaction History" (Fraunces, 20px).
  - Table layout with columns:
    - Date: "Mar 26, 2026 9:14 AM IST" (Geist, 14px). Converted from UTC to browser local timezone.
    - Type: "Withdrawal" | "Rate Settlement" | "Milestone" | "Final Payout" (Geist, 14px, color-coded: withdrawal=--stream-green, settlement=blue, milestone=--primary, final=--accent).
    - Amount: "+$7,200.08 PAYUSD" (monospace, 14px, --stream-green).
    - Explorer: "View on Explorer" text link (ExplorerLink, --primary color, underline on hover, opens new tab).
  - Rows sorted by timestamp descending (most recent first).
  - Max 10 rows visible, "Show All" link if more.
  - Empty state: centered text "No withdrawals yet. Your salary is accruing -- withdraw anytime!" with a subtle wallet icon. Geist, 14px, --text-light at 50%.

---

## Appendix A: Responsive Behavior (STRETCH)

Desktop-first design (demo is on a laptop). Responsive is classified as STRETCH.

If implemented:
- **< 1024px (tablet)**: Employer dashboard switches from 2-column to single-column stacked layout. EmployeeList moves below management tools.
- **< 768px (mobile)**: All content single-column. StreamCounter font reduces to 36px. EmployeeRow actions collapse into a dropdown menu. Header collapses to hamburger.
- **< 480px (small mobile)**: SpotlightCard padding reduces. How It Works cards stack vertically.

For MVP: optimize for 1280px+ viewport width. No breakpoints required.

---

## Appendix B: Accessibility Notes

- All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) must have visible focus indicators.
- Color is not the only indicator of status -- text labels accompany colored dots.
- StreamCounter uses `aria-live="polite"` for screen reader updates (throttled to every 5s, not every 1s).
- Toast notifications use `role="alert"` for screen reader announcement.
- Explorer links use `target="_blank"` with `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
- Form inputs have associated `<label>` elements.

---
